text_raw: The divine seal hangs heavy on me...
text_clean: The divine seal hangs heavy on me...

text_raw: Whatever you attempt, you will never slip my grasp.
text_clean: Whatever you attempt, you will never slip my grasp.

text_raw: Your strength will serve me, and the seal will shatter.
text_clean: Your strength will serve me, and the seal will shatter.

text_raw: Let the serpent curse the fate that awaits!
text_clean: Let the serpent curse the fate that awaits!

text_raw: You dare challenge the one who caged the divine?
text_clean: You dare challenge the one who caged the divine?

text_raw: Such a diverting gift has not come to me in many years.
text_clean: Such a diverting gift has not come to me in many years.

text_raw: I am Priscus, and with each breath, my power swells.
text_clean: I am Priscus, and with each breath, my power swells.
